meta.title: Linguist - Privacy-Focused Browser Translator Extension
meta.description: Browser translator extension for Chrome and Firefox. Translate pages, highlighted text and subtitles instantly with privacy and offline support.

hero.title: Translate all the things.
hero.description:
The Linguist is a browser extension that translates anything for you.

Translate whole web pages, highlighted text, Netflix subtitles, and private messages. Speak the translated text and save important translations to your personal dictionary to learn words even offline.

Linguist is a state of the art and privacy‑focused alternative for a google translate. Try it for free.

opensource.title: Open source
opensource.content:
Linguist is completely free and <0>open-source</0> browser extension. It does not collect any user data to sell.

You may <1>donate</1> to support the Linguist and help us keep independence and high quality.

Share the Linguist in social media. Spread the word - help us to make it popular!

support.title: Support
support.content:
If you have any questions, contact us <0/>.
If you found some bugs and have a GitHub - <1>create issue</1>.

offlineTranslation.title: Offline translation and privacy
offlineTranslation.content:
Translate any texts on your device without sending any private messages over the internet with an embedded offline translator.

Simply enable the feature on the options page to maintain your privacy while translating work emails and personal messages.

With the offline translator you may translate pages even with no internet, that is especially useful in travel.

fullPageTranslation.title: Full page translation
fullPageTranslation.content:
Fast and high-quality full-page translation in few clicks.

Translation is available by hotkey. You may see the original text by hovering over it. Translate even a private pages over log-in or a pay-wall.

Setup the auto-translation for a pages with rules based on page language or its domain.

selectedTextTranslation.title: Translation for selected text
selectedTextTranslation.content:
Encountering unfamiliar words while reading an online article?
Just select the text on the page and click the button to translate it.

You can speak the translated and original text and save the translation to your dictionary, to find it later.

textTranslation.title: Text translation always at hand
textTranslation.content: If you need to translate anything, just click the Linguist button and enter your text. No more tabs with translation services, just use Linguist with any service you prefer.

knowledgeBase.title: Make your own personal knowledge base
knowledgeBase.content:
Any translated text is saved in the history, and you can add a favorite translations to dictionary. You can search for translations in your dictionary and history. Nothing will be lost even after extensive research activity.

The dictionary is available even when you are offline. Linguist is built for a language learners and travelers who require constant access to their word lists.

customTranslators.title: Custom translators
customTranslators.content:
With Linguist you have control over the translation service to use.

The Linguist provides a popular translation services from Google, Yandex, Microsoft, and others.

If you miss some service in the list, you can add it as a <0>custom translator</0>.

With the custom translators you may add any service that is not added into Linguist yet. It may be a new LLM like ChatGPT was in 2022, or it may be any service that runs locally on your device, like Ollama or LibreTranslate.
